title: Inventory Scale Fix
description:
📦 Inventory Scale For 1.21.8+
An updated port of the original Inventory Scale mod by microcontrollers, kept alive for Minecraft 1.21.8 and above. Simply scale up your inventory UI with ease!
⚠️ Known Bug: Player model is missing in the inventory screen.
body:
# 📦 __**Inventory Scale Fix**__
🔄 Brings back the beloved inventory resizing experience for **Minecraft 1.21.8+!**

The original mod by **microcontrollers** was discontinued — and while it was relaunched as **BetterScreens** for 1.21.5+, it just didn't feel the same. So I took it upon myself to keep the original alive and updated for modern versions!

✨ Simply scale up your inventory to make it bigger and easier to use — just the way it was meant to be.

**📌 Currently available for:** 1.21.11
**🔜 Coming soon:** Full support for all versions 1.21.8+ will be added shortly!

─────────────────────
⚠️ **__Known Bug:__**
The player model does not appear in the inventory screen. I'm aware of this and working on a fix!

─────────────────────
💬 **__Join the Discord__** to report bugs, share suggestions, or just hang out:
👉 https://discord.gg/JSFQwun2ZX

🎫 **__For bug reports or requests for new/older versions, please join my Discord and open a ticket — I'll be happy to help!__**

─────────────────────
📌 **Credit:** All original credit goes to **microcontrollers** for creating the mod.
🎵 **TikTok:** @dwmirlol
